CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'SaaS', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), Onboarding_Training_Call_Sched_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Onboarding_Training_Call_Sched_Stamp__c)), Onboarding_Training_Call_Sched_Stamp__c, Combined_Funnel__r.Reference_SaaS_Training_Call_Scheduled__c ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: Onboarding Training Call Scheduled
